data.name: 金斧偶像
data.detailed_description:
◆故事簡介

從天而降的通天冰柱把世界都冰封了，雪線一路南侵到了南方的小鎮，熔爐鎮，在那裡，一名作為鐵匠的女孩想要打造出能斬斷任何冰柱的最強金斧，為此來拯救世界。
就算獲得了金主的贊助，研發還是要經費的，她只好一邊兼職當偶像來賺錢了，這是有關金斧偶像金小萱，一邊當鐵匠一邊當偶像來拯救世界的故事。

◆玩法要素

賺取足夠研發金斧的費用，玩家必須要努力經營鐵匠鋪，其中最重要的參數就是現金流，關係著每個月結束會獲得的金錢數量，可能受到鐵匠鋪升級而減少，但也可靠著投資案、偶像活動等來提升，具體如何選擇必須審慎評估。

腳做的平衡:投資案至少還有點規律，現實的投資他媽的根本沒有平衡與規律

◆遊戲特色

結局五種

戀愛養成遊戲
少見的遊戲數值機制，可能過不了可能隨便過
充滿色情、帥氣與神經病的劇情
多達十萬字的文本

data.supported_languages: 繁體中文, 英文, 簡體中文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 64bit
  • 處理器: intel i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit
  • 處理器: intel i5
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Golden Axe Idol
data.detailed_description:
◆Story

One day an Ice Pillar appeared in the world, freezing everything up to the borders of small southern town, Forge Town. A blacksmith girl living there wants to create the strongest Golden Axe, so she can use it to cut down the Ice Pillar and save the world.
Although she has some money, she still needs more for research and development. In order to earn money she has to work as a part-time idol. This is a story of a Golden Axe Idol who works as a blacksmith and an idol in order to save the world.

◆Gameplay

Players manage Kimmy’s blacksmith shop to earn enough money to craft golden axes. Monthly income plays an important role in your balance sheet, and upgrading your blacksmith shop means more monthly expenses. But you can seek additional funding or take on celebrity work to earn extra income. How you find balance is up to you, but be careful. Making the wrong choice might lead to unexpected results.

◆Game Features

Five different endings
Love cultivation game
RNG-based income, difficulty can vary
Story about beauty full of drama and sex
Up to 100,000 words of scenario text

  • Processor: intel i3
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • DirectX: Version 10
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
